one_time_description: Corrections aux exercices antérieurs liées à l'analyse des états financiers des années antérieures des différents bailleurs de fonds, dont 2 309 570 $ appliqués aux fonds non utilisés - Services aux Autochtones Canada et 736 173 $ aux autres bailleurs de fonds.
economic_notes: 8 government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: Scierie Opitciwan (55%), Services Forestiers Opitciwan (99.99%), Épicerie Opitciwonok (99.99%), Développement Économique Opitciwan inc. (100%), Station Service Opitciwan (99.99%), Opitciwan Télécom (99.99%), Société de Télécommunications Atikamekw-Cri S.E.C. (16.67%), Onimiskiw Opitciwan (99.99%). Council guaranteed a loan of up to $1,086,300 for a limited partnership.
notes: Audit is qualified (opinion avec réserve) due to non-compliance with SP 3280 (asset retirement obligations) - Council did not identify or measure asset retirement obligation liabilities. Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Financial statements are in French. Prior year corrections of $3,045,743 applied to accumulated surplus. 8 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC (77,743,189) + SCHL (876,459) + Federal Other (4,053,730) + Provincial (7,394,401) = 90,067,779. OSR = 92,161,064 - 90,067,779 = 2,093,285 (includes GBE equity income, band fund revenues, other revenues, net of deferred revenue). Tangible capital assets includes both Fonds d'exploitation (71,096,470) and Fonds d'habitation (10,391,261) plus prepaid expenses (32,469) = 81,519,700 but balance sheet shows 81,487,731 as total non-financial assets. Sectorial information was cut off in the provided text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (84.36%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
